Interface EncryptingConverter<S,T>

All Superinterfaces:
MongoValueConverter<S,T>, PropertyValueConverter<S, T, MongoConversionContext>
All Known Implementing Classes:
MongoEncryptionConverter
public interface EncryptingConverter<S,T> extends MongoValueConverter<S,T>
A specialized MongoValueConverter for encrypting and decrypting properties.
Since:
4.1
Author:
Christoph Strobl

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface PropertyValueConverter

    PropertyValueConverter.FunctionPropertyValueConverter<DV,SV,P>, PropertyValueConverter.ObjectToObjectPropertyValueConverter

    Method
    Description
    EncryptionContext
    buildEncryptionContext(MongoConversionContext context)
    Obtain the EncryptionContext for a given value conversion context.
    @Nullable S
    decrypt(Object encryptedValue, EncryptionContext context)
    Decrypt the given encrypted source value within the given context.
    T
    encrypt(@Nullable Object value, EncryptionContext context)
    Encrypt the given raw source value within the given context.
    default @Nullable S
    read(Object value, MongoConversionContext context)

    readNull, writeNull

  • Method Details

    • read

      default @Nullable S read(Object value, MongoConversionContext context)
      Specified by:
      read in interface PropertyValueConverter<S, T, MongoConversionContext>

    • decrypt

      @Nullable S decrypt(Object encryptedValue, EncryptionContext context)
      Decrypt the given encrypted source value within the given context.
      Parameters:
      encryptedValue - the encrypted source.
      context - the context to operate in.
      Returns:
      never null.

    • write

      default @Nullable T write(Object value, MongoConversionContext context)
      Specified by:
      write in interface PropertyValueConverter<S, T, MongoConversionContext>

    • encrypt

      T encrypt(@Nullable Object value, EncryptionContext context)
      Encrypt the given raw source value within the given context.
      Parameters:
      value - the encrypted source.
      context - the context to operate in.
      Returns:
      never null.

    • buildEncryptionContext

      EncryptionContext buildEncryptionContext(MongoConversionContext context)
      Obtain the EncryptionContext for a given value conversion context.
      Parameters:
      context - the current MongoDB specific ValueConversionContext.
      Returns:
      the EncryptionContext to operate in.

      • ValueConversionContext
